builds.title: 1.12.0-beta02
builds.summary: Release notes for Compose Multiplatform 1.12.0-beta02, listing changes since beta01. Features include the isClearFocusOnMouseDownEnabled flag now defaulting to false and a new ComposeUiTest.runWithoutImplicitWait. Fixes span multiple platforms, iOS (SwiftUI embedding, back gesture, RTL swipe-back, Scribble text input), Desktop (accessibility, popups/dialogs, dynamic dark theme polling), and Web text rendering.
